summary: Completed testing of Baseball stat tracker features. All 7 requested features verified working: innings selector (7/9), game creation navigates to /baseball/:id, live game loads with correct team names, pitch result buttons work, game state persists to backend, teams filtered by sport, and baseball field displays with StatMoose logo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Baseball features fully functional. Two baseball teams exist: Riverside Sluggers and Valley Hawks. Test game created at /baseball/9cf54d73-5ca5-41c9-8259-9bfaff24908d with 9 innings. Game state persists with 1 second debounce. Pitch buttons (Ball, Strike, Foul Ball) update count indicators and play-by-play log correctly.

baseball_new_game_innings_selector.notes: Game Settings section shows 7 Innings and 9 Innings buttons with data-testid attributes. 7 innings shows 'Common for high school and doubleheaders' description. 9 innings shows 'Standard regulation game' description.

creating_baseball_game_navigates_to_rout.notes: After clicking Start Game Now, navigates to /baseball/{game_id} route (e.g., /baseball/9cf54d73-5ca5-41c9-8259-9bfaff24908d)

baseball_live_game_loads_with_team_names.notes: Live game page shows 'Valley Hawks 0 - 0 Riverside Sluggers' with team colors in scoreboard

pitch_result_buttons_work.notes: Ball, Swinging Strike, Looking Strike, Foul Ball, Int. Walk, Hit By Pitch, In Play buttons all visible and clickable. Clicking updates count indicators and play-by-play log.

game_state_persists_to_backend.notes: After clicking pitch buttons, verified via API that balls=0, strikes=2, outs=0 persisted. Auto-save with 1 second debounce working.

teams_filtered_by_sport.notes: API /api/teams?sport=baseball returns only Riverside Sluggers and Valley Hawks. Basketball and football teams not shown in baseball context.

baseball_field_with_statmoose_logo.notes: Baseball diamond displays with green outfield, brown infield, white bases, fielding position labels (CENTER, LFT, RH, SECOND, SHORTSTOP, THIRD, FIRST, PITCHER, CATCHER), and StatMoose moose antlers logo in centerfield.
